ValidationRule.description: To set the Voting Decision value as “Manually Rejected - Majority Approved”, current value of Voting Decision must be “Manually Rejected”
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( Voting_Decision__c ) , ISPICKVAL(Voting_Decision__c, "Manually Rejected - Majority Approved"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Voting_Decision__c), "Manually Rejected")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To set the Voting Decision value as “Manually Rejected - Majority Approved”, current value of Voting Decision must be “Manually Rejected”
